user.title: Connect Webasto/Ampure Unite
user.description: Configure the basic Modbus TCP connection to the wallbox.

data_description.host: IP address or host name of the charger.
data_description.unit_id: Modbus unit ID used by the charger.
data_description.polling_interval: Interval in seconds for charger state refreshes.

data_description.installed_phases: Set how the charger is configured for this integration. Use 1P for a single-phase charger setup. Use 3P for a three-phase charger setup; the integration can still detect when a connected vehicle charges on only one phase.
data_description.control_mode: Enabled lets the integration take control of the charger.
data_description.startup_charge_mode: Charging mode used after Home Assistant restart or integration reload.
data_description.min_current: Lowest current in amperes the integration may request. Charging below 6 A is normally not supported.
data_description.max_current: Normal charging target and highest current in amperes the integration may request. Set this to match the charger and installation limit.
data_description.safe_current: Low safety current in amperes used when DLB cannot trust its sensor inputs. 6 A is recommended.

data_description.fixed_current: Charging current in amperes used when Fixed Current Until Unplug is active.
data_description.solar_until_unplug_strategy: Solar mode used when Solar Until Unplug is active.

data_description.dlb_enabled: Lets the integration reduce charging current when the available connection capacity becomes too low.
data_description.dlb_sensor_scope: Choose Excluded if your current sensors do not include the charger load. Choose Included if they do.
data_description.dlb_require_units: If enabled, current sensors must expose a supported unit. Unitless values are ignored.
data_description.main_fuse: Maximum current in amperes available for the full electrical connection.
data_description.safety_margin: Extra margin in amperes kept below the configured main fuse limit.

data_description.solar_control_strategy: Choose how strictly the integration should follow available solar surplus.
data_description.solar_input_model: Choose how solar input is provided. DSMR Import/Export Sensors are recommended for P1 meters with separate consumption and production sensors.
data_description.solar_grid_power_direction: Choose which sign means export to the grid. Export is treated as available solar surplus.
data_description.solar_sensor_failure_behavior: What Smart Solar and Solar Boost should do when Solar input is stale, unavailable or invalid. Continuing at Solar Minimum Current may use grid power. Eco Solar always pauses.
data_description.solar_require_units: If enabled, solar sensors must expose a supported unit (W, kW, mW, MW). Unitless values are ignored.
data_description.solar_surplus_sensor: Sensor that reports the currently available solar surplus.
data_description.solar_grid_power_sensor: Signed grid power sensor used to derive solar surplus from import and export.
data_description.solar_import_power_sensor: DSMR/P1 sensor that reports current grid import/consumption power.
data_description.solar_export_power_sensor: DSMR/P1 sensor that reports current grid export/production power.
data_description.solar_start_threshold: Minimum solar surplus required before charging may start.
data_description.solar_stop_threshold: Solar surplus level below which charging may stop again.
data_description.solar_start_delay: Time in seconds solar surplus must stay high enough before charging starts.
data_description.solar_stop_delay: Time in seconds solar surplus must stay too low before charging stops.
data_description.solar_min_runtime: Minimum time in seconds charging should keep running after a solar start.
data_description.solar_min_pause: Minimum pause in seconds before charging may start again on solar.
data_description.solar_min_current: Baseline charging current in amperes used by Smart Solar and Solar Boost. It can also be used as fallback if Solar Sensor Failure Behavior allows it.

data_description.phase_switching_mode: Experimental manual 1P/3P switching. Off is recommended unless you explicitly want to test manual phase switching.
data_description.keepalive_interval: Interval in seconds between keepalive writes.
data_description.control_sensor_timeout: Maximum sensor age in seconds before DLB or Solar input is treated as unsafe.
data_description.timeout: How many seconds the integration waits for a charger response.
data_description.retries: How many times the integration retries a failed request.

error.min_exceeds_max: Minimum current must be less than or equal to maximum current.
error.safe_current_out_of_range: The safe current must be between the configured minimum and maximum current.
error.unit_id_out_of_range: Unit ID must be between 1 and 255.
error.dlb_phase_sensor_required: Select the required DLB phase current sensors for the configured 1p or 3p installation.
error.solar_threshold_order: The solar stop threshold must be less than or equal to the solar start threshold.
error.solar_min_current_out_of_range: Solar Minimum Current must be less than or equal to Maximum Current.
error.solar_surplus_sensor_required: Select a solar surplus sensor for the surplus-sensor solar model.
error.solar_grid_sensor_required: Select a grid power sensor when solar surplus is derived from grid power.
error.solar_import_export_sensor_required: Select both import and export power sensors for DSMR import/export solar input.
error.fixed_current_out_of_range: The Fixed Current target must stay within the supported current range.
